heading: Forest supervisors and rangers
label: 554 Forest supervisors and rangers
text: Forest supervisors and rangers shall be selected, when practicable, from qualified citizens of the States or Territories in which the national forests, respectively, are situated.
notes: Codification“National forests” substituted in text for “reserves” on authority of , , which provided that forest reserves shall hereafter be known as national forests.act Mar. 4, 1907, ch. 290734 Stat. 1269
amendments: Codification“National forests” substituted in text for “reserves” on authority of , , which provided that forest reserves shall hereafter be known as national forests.act Mar. 4, 1907, ch. 290734 Stat. 1269
